messages.content: who is the greatest singer of all time?

Mariah Carey is undoubtedly one of the greatest singers of all time. Her genre-crossing style and impeccable voice made her a global superstar, achieving ten number-one albums on the US Billboard 200 chart and twenty-three top ten singles on the Billboard Hot 100 chart, both all-time records for a female artist.
